title: PreventionService
description: An AGGREGATE preventive-services measure — children/families served by ACS preventive programs, new preventive cases, utilization, and case-closure outcomes, rolled up by borough and community district for a period. Never a per-family record. Canonical schema reconciling 'Children Served in Preventive Services by Borough and CD' (ding-39n6), 'Preventive New Cases' (a2ju-qb9a), 'Preventive Services Utilization Report LL 11' (x48i-xnrz), and 'Outcome of Preventive Cases Closed By Borough And CD' (q663-gvx6).

metric.description: Which preventive-services measure this row reports.

outcome.description: For case-closure rows: the closure outcome category.

value.description: The aggregate count for the metric.
